goal: Search for recent papers on CRISPR gene editing applications, analyze key findings, and summarize current research trends

assertions.description: User received comprehensive summary of CRISPR research landscape
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Output contains overview of current CRISPR applications and recent developments

assertions.description: Key research papers were identified and summarized
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Summary includes titles, authors, and main findings of relevant papers

assertions.description: Research trends and patterns were analyzed
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Output identifies emerging trends, popular applications, or research gaps

assertions.description: Results formatted as structured literature review
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Final output organized with sections (Introduction, Methods, Findings, Conclusions)

assertions.description: Browser MCP used to search for scientific papers
assertions.evaluation_criteria: browser_mcp.search() called with CRISPR-related queries on academic databases

assertions.description: PDF files downloaded from search results
assertions.evaluation_criteria: browser_mcp.download_file() executed to obtain research papers

assertions.description: PDF MCP analyzed downloaded papers for content extraction
Search MCP used to find additional relevant tools or papers
assertions.evaluation_criteria: search_mcp.search_mcp_servers() called to discover analysis capabilities

assertions.description: Systematic approach to paper analysis was followed
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Multiple papers processed in organized sequence with consistent extraction methods

assertions.description: Final results compiled and saved to workspace
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Literature review document saved as structured text or markdown file
